CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2005 Off Calendar

Compromise Of Claim Of An Incompetent Person.
Off Calendar Aug-18-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Compromise of claim of an Incompetent Person
Comm. Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: M. Vallejo, Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR 225
Gregory F. Winslow, Esq. for Petitioner: Beatrice Elauria, present as Guardian at litem for: Manuel Elauria, adult person with desability, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Total Settlement: $600,000.00
Attorney's Fees $142,877.02
Costs $75,158.55
Medical expenses $777.90
Total Balance $378,686.53

Counsel to prepare an Order Approving Compromise of Claim using the mandatory Judicial Counsel Form.

Aug. 26, 2005
Order signed by Comm. Kaplan.
